blended.narrative: Lakeridge is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 56°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 56°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
